_comment: Bradbury lifecycle definitions. Evidence URLs are pinned to an immutable commit; branch URLs are never used because validators re-fetch independently and a moving source would cause spurious disagreement.

never_touch.reason: Failed deployment from the pre-ad00182 constructor bug. Never fund or interact.

deprecated._comment: Deployed from the pre-6e29b67 source, whose _settle paid EOAs through an internal GenVM PostMessage instead of an EVM external message. The message was inert: settlement reported FINISHED_WITH_RETURN and finalized without moving value. The ruling on each of these is VALID and consensus-backed; only the payout is broken. These contracts are immutable and release() is single-shot, so the escrow cannot be recovered by any further call. Do not call release again, do not fund, and do not use them for frontend demonstration.

0xE64Dcc5E82592c8BBF59003eF6AF772D739dDB.note: Never reached settlement, so the broken payout was never exercised. Escrow is still held by an unsettled agreement rather than stranded by a failed payout.

0xb0C263bEf959E640060045D47659582D23bb67.note: Never reached settlement. INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE has no automatic payout by design, so this case would not have exercised the bug on release() either.

case-001-no-breach.incident_window: NimbusAPI May 2026 uptime review - clean month verification

case-002-partial-refund.incident_window: NimbusAPI May 2026 uptime and maintenance-notice dispute

case-002-partial-refund-v2._comment: Redeployment of case-002 on the fixed payout path (6e29b67). New case id so the broken run's records in deploy/bradbury/case-002-partial-refund/ are preserved untouched. Escrow reduced to 0.1 GEN — the earlier 1 GEN is stranded and there is no reason to risk that much again.
case-002-partial-refund-v2.incident_window: NimbusAPI May 2026 uptime and maintenance-notice dispute

case-003-full-refund.incident_window: NimbusAPI May 2026 major unannounced outage dispute

case-004-insufficient-evidence.incident_window: NimbusAPI May 2026 uptime dispute - monitor coverage incomplete

expected.note: release() must revert. Escrow stays custodied pending mutual settlement, native appeal, or the deadlock fallback.

case-001-no-breach-v2._comment: Redeployment on the fixed payout path (6e29b67). New case id so the broken run's records are preserved untouched.
case-001-no-breach-v2.incident_window: NimbusAPI May 2026 uptime review - clean month verification

case-003-full-refund-v2.incident_window: NimbusAPI May 2026 major unannounced outage dispute

case-004-insufficient-evidence-v2._comment: Redeployment on the fixed payout path (6e29b67). New case id so the broken run's records are preserved untouched. release() must revert here; the escrow stays custodied by design, so the contract balance is expected to remain 0.1 GEN.
case-004-insufficient-evidence-v2.incident_window: NimbusAPI May 2026 uptime dispute - monitor coverage incomplete

expected.note: release() must revert. Escrow stays custodied pending mutual settlement, native appeal, or the deadlock fallback.
